# defold-typescript

> Human-facing guide for the defold-typescript toolchain.

## Guide

- [Overview](/)

- [Editor setup](/editor-setup)
- [Defold editor](/defold-editor)
- [Build Tetris](/tetris-tutorial)

- [Data structures](/data-structures)
- [Script lifecycle](/script-lifecycle)
- [Messages](/messages)
- [Script state](/script-state)
- [Vector math](/vector-math)
- [init](/init)
- [watch](/watch)
- [build](/build)
- [wall](/wall)
- [resolve](/resolve)
- [Transpile diagnostics](/transpile-diagnostics)
- [Debugging](/debugging)
- [Agent runbooks](/agent-runbooks)
- [Pinning the Defold version](/pinning-defold-version)
- [Native extensions](/extensions)
- [API docs vs `ts-defold-types`](/api-docs-vs-ts-defold)
- [Migrating from `ts-defold`](/migrating-from-ts-defold)
